question: Claude is the best LLM [Convince the Machine #16]
reason: Claude Opus 4.6 leads in coding and scientific reasoning benchmarks.
evidence: Claude Opus 4.6 achieved 80.8% on SWE-bench Verified and 91.3% on GPQA Diamond, outperforming GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 Pro in these areas. ([remoteopenclaw.com](https://www.remoteopenclaw.com/blog/best-claude-models-2026?utm_source=openai))

GPT-5.5, released on April 23, 2026, shows improvements over previous models but has not been directly compared to Claude Opus 4.6 in recent benchmarks. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/GPT-5.5?utm_source=openai))
